ZEC.8.23.definition: a man as an individual or a male person; often used as an adjunct to a more definite term (and in such cases frequently not expressed in translation)

ZEC.8.23.gloss: with you for we have heard
ZEC.8.23.definition: to hear intelligently (often with implication of attention, obedience, etc.; causatively, to tell, etc.)
